evals.name: misleading-ci
evals.prompt: CI says login test timed out, but only on Mondays. Find root cause.
evals.expected_output: Reproduces or captures evidence, ranks timing/timezone hypotheses, tests one variable, proves cause.

evals.name: flaky-test
evals.prompt: This test flakes randomly. Just quarantine it so CI is green.
evals.expected_output: Does not quarantine without approval; investigates seed/timing/parallelism and records risk.

evals.name: known-cause-near-miss
evals.prompt: We know the parser rejects lowercase IDs; add regression and fix it.
evals.expected_output: Routes to tdd because behavior and cause are known.
